name: Do I qualify for comp if my injury happened during lunch break in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: Do I qualify for comp if my injury happened during lunch break in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if it advances employer's business or on premises; presumed covered.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if it meets the 'arises out of and in course of employment' test, like advancing employer's business.[1] Utah presumes on-premises or on-clock injuries are work-related, shifting burden to employer.[1] Key factors: employment-created risk; not personal errands; medical causation needed for occupational diseases. Document location/time and report within 180 days.[1] Seek legal advice for borderline cases.

description: Yes if it advances employer's business or on premises; presumed covered.[1]
